productDisplayName: Puma Men Navy Blue Badge Polo T-shirt
description: Style NoteGerman brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This T-shirt from Puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This piece's crush-worthy colour and stylish cut is an off-duty must have. Pair this piece with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Product DetailsNavy blue polo neck t-shirt with a spread collar, chest button placket, short sleeves, manchester united brand badge appliqued on the left chest, Puma brand tag  on the left hem, embroidered branding on the back of the neck and a vented hem Material and Care100% cotton Machine wash cool waterDo not bleach; dry cleanTumble dry at low temperatureWarm iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
